todos.title: Buy groceries for the week ahead
todos.content: Milk, eggs, bread, fruits, vegetables, and snacks for the family dinner on Saturday night.

todos.title: Walk the dog in the evening park for 30 minutes
todos.content: Take the dog for a walk in the nearby park after dinner to get some fresh air and exercise.

todos.title: Finish homework assignments for math and science subjects
todos.content: Complete the math problems and science project due next week before going to bed.
